title: task
description: rust/lichen-gateway/src/bin/lichend.rs:210-214 - When sim_task encounters a receive error and exits, the gateway task continues running indefinitely without notification. The select! loop keeps waiting on ctrl_c and TUN packets, while silently dropping outbound packets. Should detect sim_task termination and either exit or attempt reconnection.
close_reason: Fixed: Changed rx_recv.recv() branch to handle None case when sim_task exits, breaking out of gateway loop with error log instead of silently continuing
